mapper.select: SELECT POST_ID AS postId, USER_ID AS userId, DELETED_YN AS deletedYn FROM COMMUNITY_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_LIKE ( POST_ID, USER_ID, DELETED_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, 'N', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT POST_ID AS postId, USER_ID AS userId, DELETED_YN AS deletedYn FROM COMMUNITY_SCRAP WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_SCRAP ( POST_ID, USER_ID, DELETED_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, 'N', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_LIKE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_SCRAP WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND DELETED_YN = 'N'
